channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Procalcitonin use in neonatal late-onset sepsis may cut antibiotic duration without raising mortality
item.description: Procalcitonin-guided decision making for neonatal late-onset sepsis significantly reduced antibiotic duration without increasing mortality.

item.title: Exam rooms become frontline in fight against youth vaping
item.description: Exam rooms are a critical and increasingly complex frontline in preventing adolescent nicotine addiction, according to Medscape Medical News.

item.title: Lab-grown brain organoids power biocomputers
item.description: A feature by Simon Spichak, MSc explores how biotech firms like Cortical Labs and FinalSpark use human brain cells to power electronic systems.

item.title: New antibiotic design could help treat drug-resistant infections
item.description: A novel approach to antibiotic design may aid in discovering treatments for drug-resistant infections and revive existing antibiotics.
